records.question: Which stadium named Stark's Park is located at Raith Rovers, has a capacity of at least 10104, a lowest attendance exactly 1294, an average attendance of at least 2106, and a highest attendance of at most 4812?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT stadium.stadium_id FROM stadium
WHERE stadium.name = 'Stark''s Park' AND stadium.highest <= 4812 AND stadium.average >= 2106 AND stadium.lowest = 1294 AND stadium.capacity >= 10104 AND stadium.location = 'Raith Rovers'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT stadium.Stadium_ID
FROM stadium
WHERE Name = 'Stark'
  AND Highest <= 4812
  AND Average >= 2106
  AND Lowest = 1294
  AND Capacity >= 10104
  AND Location = 'Raith Rovers'

records.question: Which stadiums located in Ayr United have a capacity of exactly 11998, an average of 1477, and lowest and highest values of at least 1057 and 2363 respectively?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT stadium.stadium_id FROM stadium
WHERE stadium.lowest >= 1057 AND stadium.average = 1477 AND stadium.location = 'Ayr United' AND stadium.highest >= 2363 AND stadium.capacity = 11998

SELECT stadium.Stadium_ID
FROM stadium
WHERE Lowest >= 1057
  AND Average = 1477

  AND Capacity = 11998
